name: lamina
description: Product design skill for developers who build with AI coding agents
author: Aryan Iyappan

scripts.test: node scripts/verify_lamina_bundle.mjs --check structure && node tests/check_lamina_init_test.mjs && node tests/check_lamina_personas_test.mjs && node tests/lamina_write_boundary_test.mjs && node tests/validate_run_yaml_test.mjs && node tests/persona_blockers_test.mjs && node tests/coverage_insights_test.mjs && node tests/coverage_per_flow_test.mjs
scripts.test:eval:redteam: node evals/promptfoo/build-skill-context.mjs && npx promptfoo eval -c evals/promptfoo/lamina-redteam.yaml
scripts.bench:pipeline-check: npm run bench:validate && npm run bench:run:mock && npm run bench:score:heuristic && npm run bench:analyze && npm run bench:human-packet
scripts.bench:all: npm run bench:validate && npm run bench:run && npm run bench:score && npm run bench:analyze && npm run bench:human-packet
